# Q1 2024 Digital Trust Index: Next Gen Payment Fraud

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Merchant losses due to payment fraud are expected to soar in the next few years, driven by economic pressures felt by businesses and consumers alike. New insights from Sift reveal a shift in consumer behavior as younger generations, particularly Gen Z, are not only more susceptible to fraud, but are also participating in fraudulent activities at a higher rate.
